calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Bao Zhong Ao was present in pro per on behalf of herself and as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Hai Peng Huang.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Ting Kam Chak was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Britney Ao.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Terence L. Huang.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
